title: Document Ruff pre-commit requirement
description: Update AGENTS.md to state that Ruff must be run before every commit and push, because CI failed when it was skipped.
close_reason: Documented that agents must run uv run ruff check . before every commit and push.

title: Update README UI preview screenshot
description: Replace the README UI preview asset with the new root screenshot at full native resolution. Convert the PNG to JPG without cropping or resizing, keep the existing docs asset path, remove the untracked root screenshot, and commit with #none.
close_reason: Replaced README preview asset with the new full-resolution screenshot converted to JPG without cropping or resizing.

title: Add UI screenshot preview to README
description: Add the existing sweep and aggregation UI screenshot from the repo root to the README near the top. Move it into a suitable tracked docs/assets location, rename it descriptively, convert it from PNG to JPG, and update the README so users get a quick preview of what the project is about.
close_reason: Moved the root screenshot into docs/assets as a JPG and added a top-level README UI preview.

title: Consolidate transport default ports into env-driven config
description: README TODO migration: transport default_port constants are still defined per class. Move these defaults into the env-driven configuration module so port configuration has a single source of truth while preserving existing transport behavior.
close_reason: Centralized transport default ports in config with env overrides and updated transport registration/tests.

title: Improve dynamic batching configurability
description: README TODO migration: improve dynamic batching so batch sizes and waiting times can be configured more flexibly. Preserve current batching behavior by default and expose tunable settings consistently where batching is configured or reported.

title: Expand AGENTS.md with more guidelines
description: AGENTS.md currently only covers non-interactive shell commands and the beads quick reference. Add more concrete guidance for AI agents working on this repo (e.g. transport plug-in pattern, lazy-import rules for torch/ultralytics, test conventions with fakes instead of real model loads, when to add a new transport vs. extend an existing one, ruff/format expectations before commit).
